@graph.name: Duromine Weight Loss in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia Short-term appetite control with a doctor-led plan built for safe, structured progress.
@graph.description: Malaysia's obesity rates keep rising and appetite is at the centre of it. Nexus Clinic KL prescribes Duromine 30mg and other phentermine dosages as a short-term weight loss medication under full doctor supervision. Ubat kurus yang selamat. Book your klinik consultation today.
